title: 2D Fenwick Tree — Range Sum Queries
difficulty_rationale: Implements a 2D Fenwick (Binary Indexed) Tree for range sum queries and point updates in O(log^2 n). Requires understanding of BIT index manipulation (i & -i) extended to 2D. Non-trivial to get coordinate ordering correct. Near-miss uses incorrect 2D update propagation that misses some contributions.
